outline.headline: AI Presentation Systems Overview
outline.message: Introduce the topic of AI presentation systems and their capabilities.

outline.headline: Data Ingestion Methods
outline.message: Explain how AI systems ingest data using structured data, document uploads, and cloud file links.

outline.headline: Hybrid Architecture Components
outline.message: Describe the hybrid architecture: data ingestion, retrieval, content planning, and layout.

outline.headline: Design Quality Strategies
outline.message: Compare template-first, rule-based auto-layout, and free-form layout generation strategies.

outline.headline: Template and Rule-Driven Layouts
outline.message: Discuss the use of templates and rules to ensure polished and predictable layouts.

outline.headline: Intermediate Representation and Standards
outline.message: Explain the role of SlideSpec JSON and standards-compliant OOXML in AI presentation systems.

outline.headline: Landscape of AI Presentation Tools
outline.message: Analyze representative tools and their approaches to achieving visual polish.

outline.headline: Key Takeaways and Recommendations
outline.message: Summarize the main points and provide recommendations for Oracle consultants.
